Walkscape Walkthrough

Tip of the day
Being overencumbered only slows down your activities, but doesn't affect travel.

Chests

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Namespaces

  • Page
  • Discussion

More

  • More

Page actions

  • Read
  • View source
  • History
  • Purge

Chests are openable items that drop at a base 1/250 rate per action from doing activities (with the exception of traveling). Their type is determined by the activity's skills involved that have actual level requirements and not the experience obtained. This can lead to some activities having the potential to drop more than one chest type in a single action. If an activity can drop more than one chest or openable, they each have an independent 1/250 base drop rate as well.

When acquired, they do not take up space, but instead they will be displayed in your treasury tab under your Inventory where they can be viewed or opened from there. The rewards for a chest are rolled upon opening, not upon receiving the chest.

The Chest Finding equipment attribute can add to the base drop rate of finding chests during activities. So equipment with "+1% Chest Finding" gives a new chance of 1.01/250 per roll on the chest loot table (does not affect the ability to find Bird Nests).

While uniquely, the Find Bird Nests equipment attribute can add to the base 1/250 drop rate of finding Bird Nests during their obtainable activities in the same manner.

Loot Rolls

All chests go through four rolls for loot. Each of those rolls gets broken up into two separate rolls. The first part of a roll goes based on the table below. After rolling on that, it will then roll for an item based on the sub-table involved.

If a chest has a sub-table or tables that are blank the games adds that chance onto the miscellaneous table's chances.

Please note that the chances for loot are based off of the individual rolls and not the total amount given by a chest/treasury item itself.

Loot Table
Chance Sub-table
50.00% Main Table
21.64% Coins and Trinkets
20.00% - Grey
5.00% - Green
2.50% - Blue
0.75% - Purple
0.10% - Yellow
0.01% - Red

Chest Types

Skilling chests are those dropped by activities that give XP in that skill.

Chest Name Skill
Agility chest Agility
Carpentry chest Carpentry
Cooking chest Cooking
Crafting chest Crafting
Fishing chest Fishing
Foraging chest Foraging
Hunting chest Hunting
Mining chest Mining
Smithing chest Smithing
Tailoring chest Tailoring
Trinketry chest Trinketry
Woodcutting chest Woodcutting


Regional chests are those given as a reward for reaching milestones with the various factions or by completing jobs.

Chest Name Sources
Chest of Erdwise Erdwise Faction Rewards, Blackspell Port job board, Everhaven combined job board
Chest of Jarvonia Jarvonia Faction Rewards, Azurazera job board, Kallaheim job board
Chest of Syrenthia Syrenthia Faction Rewards, Vastalume job board
Chest of Trellin Trellin Faction Rewards, Everhaven combined job board, Granfiddich job board
Chest of the Halfling Rebels Halfling Rebels Faction Rewards, Halfling Campgrounds job board


Other chests can be gained from various sources.

Chest Name Sources
Adventuring guild chest Adventurers' Guild Outpost, Adventurers' Guild Swampost
Bird nest Branch trimming, Cut bamboo, Cut birch trees, Cut ectoplasm trees, Cut mangrove trees, Cut maple trees, Cut oak trees, Cut pine trees, Cut spruce trees, Cut teak trees, Cut willow trees, Cut yew trees, House jumping, Hut jumping, Shovel axe
Coin pouch Antique market assessor, Brig repair, Guard duty, Horseshoe making, Tinkering, Underwater basket weaving, Wreck diving, Royal troubadour hat
Coral chest Cave diving, Coral cutting, Drift net hunting, Fossil mining, Kelp foraging, Merfolk dancing, Merfolk farm foraging, Mine volcanic rock, Predator fishing (Spear), Sea fishing (Spear), Underwater basket weaving, Underwater swimming, Wreck diving
Gem pouch Trinketry chest, Antique market assessor, Guard duty, Hull repair, Spelunking, Underwater basket weaving, Wine grape stomping, Wreck diving
Rusty chest Cut birch trees, Forest foraging, Sandcastle building, Sea fishing (Net), Surface copper mining, Surface salt mining, Sticky finger shorts, Trash grabber, Herbert's Guiding Grounds Faction Rewards, Herbert's job board
Sunken chest Bodysurfing, Sea fishing (Cage), Sea fishing (Net), Sea fishing (Rod), Seashell searching, Surface swimming, Sticky finger shorts, Trash grabber


Unavailable

These regional chests are not currently in the game yet, but they sure look cool! There is no info on acquiring them yet.

Regional Chests
Chest Region Source
Wallisia Chests Wallisia ?
Galeforge Chests Galeforge ?
Wrentmark Chests Wrentmark ?


This page is updated automatically to reflect information in the current game version.
